brief.speaker: pharaoh
brief.text: My later years — year 5 onward. Include year 5 itself. I would see the whole of that second half.

expected.sql: SELECT overseer, year FROM granary WHERE year >= 5

hints.text: Pharaoh: 'Too many years. Include year 5, not year 4.'
Pharaoh: 'Year 5 itself must be included — check your operator.'
Pharaoh: 'The operator that means greater OR equal is the one you want.'

success.speaker: pharaoh
success.text: The weight of a decade. Now — the strange small entries.
